## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 30, 2026 - May 30, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _quietvest_, May 30, 2026, 5/5: "I have been using this app for years. It is useful, elegant, and flawless. It lets me adapt it for exactly the types of habits I am trying to maintain (or break!) and doesn’t come loaded down with a bunch of unnecessary junk. It has never glitched or had bugs. Would recommend it to anyone trying to form a daily habit or track how well they’re maintaining one. As an additional bonus, it provides graphs of how you’re doing over various periods of time that you can explore when you want. Again, a perfect app."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Apr 27, 2026 - Apr 27, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _AmandaL30_, Apr 27, 2026, 5/5: "This app is subtly brilliant. I love the weak view. It feels more motivating than just checkboxes and seeing today. Three habits for free and no annoying ads or premium reminders. I’ve tried a lot of habit apps and this one is simpler but my favorite. Shout out to having nice color themes for free too!"
